title: RAG-based Document QA System
description: Production-ready Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline for querying large document corpora — FAISS vector store, OpenAI embeddings, streaming responses.

title: ML Model Monitoring Platform
description: End-to-end MLOps platform for tracking experiments, monitoring model drift, and auto-retraining pipelines — deployed on Kubernetes.

title: Sentiment Analysis API
description: Fine-tuned BERT model for multi-label sentiment classification — served as a REST API with FastAPI, 94% accuracy on benchmark.

title: Real-Time Data Pipeline
description: Scalable streaming data pipeline ingesting 1M+ events/hour — Apache Kafka, Spark Streaming, Delta Lake, orchestrated with Airflow.
